channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tesla’s battle with the California Department of Motor Vehicles isn’t over after all
item.description: Tesla has filed a lawsuit against the California DMV in the ongoing battle around Autopilot.

item.title: Stripe, PayPal Ventures bet on India’s Xflow to fix cross-border B2B payments
item.description: Stripe and PayPal Ventures have participated in Xflow's $16.6 million round that gives it a post-money valuation of $85 million.

item.title: Canva acquires startups working on animation and marketing
item.description: With the new acquisitions, the company wants to bolster its position as a marketing solution by potentially adding video creation and more granular me...

item.title: A Meta AI security researcher said an OpenClaw agent ran amok on her inbox
item.description: The viral X post from an AI security researcher reads like satire. But it's really a word of warning about what can go wrong when handing tasks to an ...

item.title: Uber’s new autonomous vehicle division is about survival and opportunity
item.description: Uber Autonomous Solutions will see the company taking on all the tasks associated with operating a robotaxi, self-driving truck, or sidewalk delivery ...

item.title: Uncanny Valley: AI Researchers’ Resignations, Bots Hiring Humans, Evie Magazine’s Party
item.description: This episode of Uncanny Valley covers the people resigning from AI companies and the humans getting hired by AI agents. Plus, we attend a soiree throw...

item.title: Google’s Cloud AI lead on the three frontiers of model capability
item.description: AI models are pushing against three frontiers at once: raw intelligence, response time, and a third quality you might call "extensibility."

item.title: Anthropic accuses Chinese AI labs of mining Claude as US debates AI chip exports
item.description: Anthropic accuses DeepSeek, Moonshot, and MiniMax of using 24,000 fake accounts to distill Claude’s AI capabilities, as U.S. officials debate export c...

item.title: Ex-Apple team launches Acme Weather, a new take on weather forecasting
item.description: The team that sold their last app Dark Sky to Apple are back with Acme Weather, which offers alternative forecasts, rainbow and sunset alerts, and mor...

item.title: With AI, investor loyalty is (almost) dead: At least a dozen OpenAI VCs now also back Anthropic
item.description: While some dual investors are understandable, others were more shocking, and signal the disregard of a longstanding ethical conflict-of-interest rule.
